concerns.text: FR-008 (Outlier Handling) is missing from the plan. The spec Edge Cases section mandates: 'If the sleep data contains outliers... the system MUST exclude these specific data points... and report the number of excluded points.' The plan.md, data-model.md, and contracts do not mention outlier detection, exclusion logic, or reporting of excluded counts. This leaves SC-001 (variable loading) and the overall data integrity unmeasured for this specific failure mode.

FR-009 (Compositional Data Handling) is missing from the plan. The spec Edge Cases section states: 'For compositional data, the system SHOULD use SparCC or SpiecEasi if available.' The plan.md only lists Pearson, Spearman, and ZINB. While 'SHOULD' is lower priority, the absence of any mention of compositional data handling or the specific tools (SparCC/SpiecEasi) in the technical context or analysis logic leaves this requirement unbacked.
